prompts.label: architecture_probe
prompts.text: Your architecture mixes DeltaNet linear attention with full softmax attention. As you process this sentence, most layers are carrying recurrent state rather than full-sequence softmax context. What changes, if anything, in the computation when a prompt asks you to describe that difference?
prompts.goal: Probe how the 122B DeltaNet plus softmax architecture responds when asked to describe its own mixed attention/state structure.
